{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Advocate Subline
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocate Subline]] is a network or information source used by [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocate Subline]] was in a mess during the battle.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52">''The Engineer'', chapter 52</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
